title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
